title: AT Field Deployment
wikitext:
[]: A.T. Field Deployment             Quote Post by EVA X » Tue Jan 12, 2010 4:46 am Does any AT-Field need to be deployed in order to protect an Angel, or is it for EVA based defense? For example...when Sachiel arrives, and the army unloads all that artillery on him, he's undamaged. However, he doesn't form an AT-Field to protect himself. Infact, he doesn't form a field to protect himself until the Beserk EVA Unit 1 goes on the rage. The same thing goes for Shamshell and Zeruel, so is an Angel already immune to conventional attack, and the AT-Field is for heavier attacks?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 12, 2010 5:01 am For example...when Sachiel arrives, and the army unloads all that artillery on him, he's undamaged. However, he doesn't form an AT-Field to protect himself.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Tue Jan 12, 2010 5:10 am Reichu wrote: For example...when Sachiel arrives, and the army unloads all that artillery on him, he's undamaged. However, he doesn't form an AT-Field to protect himself.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Tue Jan 12, 2010 8:18 pm Another thing, what about when we see the actual explosions hitting Sachiel's body? No visible AT Field can be seen, is the protection skin deep?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 12, 2010 8:42 pm Are you sure any of the explosions (except the mine, obviously) are directly in contact with his body? Here, for example, it's apparent that the explosions are striking an invisible wall.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Tue Jan 12, 2010 8:57 pm Hm, when the image is frozen, they do seem to be hitting a wall. When in motion though, it seemed like they struck the Angel. Guess I'm wrong again, heh...

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Wed Jan 13, 2010 6:48 pm EVA X wrote: Hm, when the image is frozen, they do seem to be hitting a wall. When in motion though, it seemed like they struck the Angel. Guess I'm wrong again, heh...

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:19 am Just a thought, Couldn't they just have a Eva run out there, neutralize the ATF, run back, and then pummel the Angel with conventional weapons? Or would it just be easier to have the Eva fight while it's out there?

[]: Re: Does an AT-Field need to be deployed...             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:32 am EVA X wrote: In order to protect an Angel, or is it for EVA based defense? For example...when Sachiel arrives, and the army unloads all that artillery on him, he's undamaged. However, he doesn't form an AT-Field to protect himself. Infact, he doesn't form a field to protect himself until the Beserk EVA Unit 1 goes on the rage. The same thing goes for Shamshell and Zeruel, so is an Angel already immune to conventional attack, and the AT-Field is for heavier attacks?

[]: Re: Does an AT-Field need to be deployed...             Quote Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:43 am shinjidoggysasuka wrote: EVA X wrote: In order to protect an Angel, or is it for EVA based defense? For example...when Sachiel arrives, and the army unloads all that artillery on him, he's undamaged. However, he doesn't form an AT-Field to protect himself. Infact, he doesn't form a field to protect himself until the Beserk EVA Unit 1 goes on the rage. The same thing goes for Shamshell and Zeruel, so is an Angel already immune to conventional attack, and the AT-Field is for heavier attacks?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:07 pm I'm sure an Angel could get it's AT Field up the second it's no longer being neutralized, considering it's a facet of their mind.

[]:             Quote Post by LordCaldwell » Wed Jan 20, 2010 8:36 am Couldn't one make the argument that it's AT field WAS actually broken? When they hit him with the N^2 mine, he stops his attack (kinda) and his weird gills have been melted, as well as he grows a new face.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 20, 2010 8:48 am LordCaldwell wrote: Couldn't one make the argument that it's AT field WAS actually broken? When they hit him with the N^2 mine, he stops his attack (kinda) and his weird gills have been melted, as well as he grows a new face.

[]: Re: Does an AT-Field need to be deployed...             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Jan 20, 2010 9:33 am EVA X wrote: For example...when Sachiel arrives, and the army unloads all that artillery on him, he's undamaged. However, he doesn't form an AT-Field to protect himself.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 20, 2010 3:04 pm Sachi wrote: Actually, I believe the only time is when Unit-01 goes berserk on Zeruel and completely shatters his AT Field. Yeah, Unit-01 tears through Sachiel's AT Field, but that was more of a neutralization of the AT Field.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 20, 2010 3:20 pm

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jan 20, 2010 8:18 pm ^ that needs to be a T-shirt.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 20, 2010 8:22 pm ^- It's already a t-shirt .

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jan 20, 2010 9:17 pm okay, so it needs to be a t-shirt in my closet.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Wed Jan 20, 2010 9:36 pm I think there is a shirt like that but the dude is riding a giant ameoba(spelling?)
